name: Marketing SaaS
description: SaaS marketing landing page with hero, features, how-it-works timeline, pricing, testimonials, and CTA sections.

page_briefs.home: Classic SaaS landing page. Brand hero with headline, subtext, and dual CTA buttons. Feature card grid with icons. How-it-works timeline with numbered steps and connecting lines. Pricing section with tier cards and monthly/annual toggle. Testimonial card row. Final CTA banner.

directives: Marketing home uses `d-shell` (default top-nav-footer layout) + `d-shell-header` + `d-shell-body` + `d-shell-footer`. Do not hand-roll a page-level wrapper.
Hero on `/` uses the `hero/brand` preset (full-viewport minimum height, radial gradient, dual CTAs). In-app primary section pages like `/marketplace` use `hero/section-primary` (compact, no splash).
CTA banner uses `d-cta-banner` treatment with `d-interactive[data-variant="dark"]` for the pill button. Do not hand-roll gradient stops or raw-hex colors.
Pricing toggle state lives in component local state, not global. Tier cards use `carbon-card` with a highlighted variant for the recommended tier (accent border + `aura-glow` when present).
Marketing footer is a narrow `d-shell-footer` with link groups. Do not create a full-bleed marketing footer with 6 columns unless the blueprint explicitly requests it.

shells.top-nav-footer: Top navigation with hero and footer for marketing pages
